name: Psono
description: Psono — open source password manager for teams with REST API and client-side encryption.

seo.title: Psono — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Psono: Psono — open source password manager for teams with REST API and client-side encryption.

when_to_use: Self-hosted team password manager with REST API integration
Client-side encrypted credential sharing for DevOps teams
LDAP integration for enterprise identity-linked secret access
Audit log API for SOC 2 access control review evidence
TOTP and WebAuthn MFA for privileged account protection

pros: REST API usable for CI and automation
cons: UI is less refined than commercial tools
Docs can be sparse on edge cases
review.verdict: A credible self-hosted team password manager with a real API; UX is the main tradeoff.
review.best_for: Teams wanting a self-hosted password vault with API-driven access.
review.not_for: Teams who prioritize end-user polish over self-hosting.
